challenge.explanation: E-mail kaže, our company has recently faced some security threats i pominje dodavanje sekcije o cyber prevarama (phishing). Ovo ukazuje da je oprez u vezi sa cyber prevarama posledica nedavnih sigurnosnih pretnji, a ne promena politike.
challenge.instructions: Pročitajte tekst i odgovorite na pitanje koje se nalazi ispod.

questions.text:
Nekoliko dana nakon razgovora sa Annom, Brian je poslao ovaj e-mail timu:

Email subject: Cybersecurity Training Session

Dear Team,

I want to update you on our next cybersecurity training session.

Details:

- Topic: Password Security and Phishing

- Date: August 15, 2024

- Time: 10:00 AM - 12:00 PM

- Location: Google Meet

Why Attend?

As you know, our company has recently faced some security threats. We're adding a section on phishing, using real-life scenarios to ensure everyone uses strong passwords and protects our data.

Attendance:

Attendance is mandatory. If you can't attend, please inform your manager.

Looking forward to seeing you all.

Best regards,

Brian

Zašto kompanija trenutno obraća pažnju na simulaciju mrežnog prevarantištva (phishing) tokom obuke?

answers.feedback: E-pošta cilja na sigurnosne pretnje, a ne produkciju.
E-mail nije spomenuo nove alate za softver.

answers.answer: Zato što kompanija menja svoje politike bezbednosti mreže.
answers.feedback: Obratite pažnju ako e-mail spominje promene u politici ili potrebu za rešavanjem specifičnih pretnji.

challenge.title: Vežba 96
